rationale: The executable 'ILL_UNBLINKING.exe' (parent process in EV-001, EV-002, EV-004) repeatedly creates 'notepad.exe' processes and then injects remote threads into them (A0, EV-003, EV-005). This behavior, specifically remote thread creation into a benign process like Notepad from an unknown executable, is highly indicative of process injection, a common technique for evading detection and executing malicious code.
